# Build v0.20e-build1916  —  what most likely changed

_vs v0.1.1e-build884 · 2013-05-28 → 2014-03-20_

From **added/deleted hand-written engine functions only** (+4163 / −6812), grouped by owning class/namespace. Added/deleted are clear non-drift signal; fuzzy `changed` is excluded.

## Likely changes at a glance

- **New (697):** `survarium::game_world_core`, `vostok::physics::old_bullet_character_controller`, `survarium::game_statistics_handler`, `vostok::animation::mixing::n_ary_tree_serializer`, `survarium::artefact_spring_core`, `survarium::gather_victory_items_rule`, `survarium::player_respawn_rule`, `survarium::shared_statistics`, `vostok::animation::mixing::n_ary_tree_deserializer`, `vostok::animation::mixing::n_ary_tree_node_cloner`, `vostok::network_core::buffer_writer`, `survarium::artefact_base` _+685 more_
- **Removed (730):** `survarium::human_npc`, `vostok::ai::brain_unit`, `vostok::ai::ai_world`, `vostok::ai`, `vostok::ai::planning`, `vostok::render::stage_light_propagation_volumes`, `vostok::collision::containment_double_dispatcher`, `vostok::collision::intersection_double_dispatcher`, `vostok::collision::capsule_geometry_instance`, `vostok::collision::truncated_sphere_geometry_instance`, `vostok::collision::composite_geometry_instance`, `vostok::collision::triangle_mesh_geometry_instance` _+718 more_
- **Reworked (968):** `(global)`, `vostok::render::effect_manager`, `vostok::render`, `survarium::weapon_core`, `survarium::player`, `vostok::memory`, `vostok::vfs`, `survarium::game_world_ui`, `survarium::base_player`, `vostok::render::engine::world`, `survarium::lobby_menu`, `survarium` _+956 more_
